title: Mako Mermaids Mod
description: Live your H2O dream! Play as Cleo, Emma, Rikki or Mako characters, use elemental powers, and create your own story!
body:
# 🌊 Official Mako Mermaids Minecraft Mod

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/83EqszRlGjI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

🎬 **New Showcase Video:** https://youtu.be/CBbTB6Kdxq4?si=TtKh-MFCiTDvmnrL

🌐 **Website:** https://makomoddev.github.io/mako-mermaids-mod-official/

## [💬 Join the Official Discord Server](https://discord.gg/uv4sttKEw3)

---

## ⚠️ Disclaimer

- This is an **unofficial fan-made project** based on the TV shows *H2O: Just Add Water* and *Mako Mermaids*.
- I am not affiliated with Jonathan M. Shiff Productions or any other rights holders.
- All rights to the original shows, characters, and content belong to their respective owners.
- This mod is created **purely for entertainment purposes** and is completely **free to use**.

---

## ✨ Features

> **Always make sure you are on the latest available version!**

- Choose your favourite character from *Mako Mermaids* or *H2O: Just Add Water* when first entering a world via an interactive GUI selection screen.
- Some abilities can be activated using **hand gestures** *(see the Gestures section below)*.
  - 📖 *Tutorial and required files:* https://makomoddev.github.io/mako-mermaids-mod-official/downloads
- **Wiki available in-game**
- **Custom Main Menu and blue-themed GUI**

---

### 🧜 Playable Characters

**Cleo · Emma · Rikki · Bella · Charlotte · Nixie · Lyla · Sirena · Mimmi · Ondina · Weilan · Zac · Cam · Evie**

---

### 📜 Commands

| Command | Description |
|---|---|
| `/change_character` | Switch to a different character |
| `/what_character` | Display your currently selected character |

---

### ⚡ Abilities

- Every character has **unique abilities** based on their series and role.
- **Transform into a mermaid** when underwater, in rain, or exposed to Moon Water *(rain disables positive status effects)*.
- **Swim faster** underwater — hold `C` while swimming.
- See the current **moon phase** by right-clicking on a bed.
- As a mermaid on land, you move slowly and need to **"melt"** back into human form *(not possible in cold biomes)*.
- After drying off, a **"Drying..." progress bar** is displayed on screen during the 5-second transformation back to human form.
- Unlock many new **achievements**.

#### 🐉 Water Dragon
- The Water Dragon has a **custom pixel-art boss health bar** displayed on screen.
- Getting hit **once** removes your mermaid form.
- Hit as a **half-mermaid** → powers removed. Hit as a **full mermaid** → instant death.
- **Turn the Tide** *(Zac & Weilan — `B` key)*: 5 seconds of immunity against the Water Dragon.

#### 🌕 Moon Events
- **Rikki** sets nearby things on fire during a full moon *(she gains fire resistance during this time)*.

---

### 🔮 Elemental Powers

> All keybinds can be customised in the game's Settings menu.

| Power | Characters | Keybind |
|---|---|---|
| Ice → Water | Cleo, Charlotte, Mako | `↓ Down` |
| Water → Ice | Emma, Charlotte, Mako | `↑ Up` |
| Place Snow | Emma, Charlotte | `↑ Up` |
| Ice → Air | Cleo, Charlotte, Mako | `X` |
| Water → Air | Rikki, Charlotte, Mako | `→ Right` |
| Water → Jelly | Bella | `↑ Up` |
| Create Thunderstorm | Ondina, Sirena | `U` |
| Turn Invisible | Mako characters only | `R` |
| Levitate Entities | Mako characters only | `G` |
| Hydrokinesis | Mako with Moon Ring, Cleo | `G` |
| Pull Items | Mako characters only | `← Left` |

---

### 🏥 Additional Features

- **Mermaid Cold** — Cold biomes inflict you with the mermaid cold. Cure it using **Seahorse Powder**, obtainable from the Ocean Café Shop.
- **Transformation Drinks** — Coconut Smoothie, Juice, or Smoothie transforms you into a mermaid after **10 seconds**.
- **Open doors** from a greater distance than normal.

---

## 🌍 Biomes & Structures

- **Beaufort Sea** — New ocean biome
- **Baltic Sea** — New ocean biome
- **Moon Pool** — Spawns rarely underground near beaches. The **only place** to find Moon Crystal Ore!

---

## 🎁 New Items

| Item | Description |
|---|---|
| **Moon Ring** *(K)* | Powers: Size Manipulation, Hydrokinesis, Item Duplication & turning mobs into cats — *Mako characters only* |
| **Moon Trident** | Crafted from a Trident + Moon Crystal — fires a powerful **magic beam attack** |
| **Ocean Café Menu** | Plays a cutscene, then lets you trade with David, Carly, Cam & Evie *(they accept seashells for smoothies, etc.)* |
| **Intro Block** | Plays the *H2O: Just Add Water* intro |
| **Seahorse Powder** | Cures the mermaid cold — *Mako characters only (except Mimmi)* |
| **Arctic Sea Lavender** | Crafting ingredient |
| **Foul Smelling Oysters** | Crafting ingredient |
| **Dried Plankton of the Baltic Sea** | Crafting ingredient |
| **Arctic Marshmallow** | Crafted from the 3 ingredients above + a Water Bucket |
| **Glass Dolphin** | Collectible decorative item |
| **Broken Glass Dolphin** | Damaged variant of the Glass Dolphin |
| **OP Armor** | Powerful armor set |
| **Seashell** | Currency for the Ocean Café — also found by **brushing Suspicious Sand**! |
| **Rope** | Crafted from 4 Strings |
| **Seashell Bracelet** | Crafted from 4 Seashells + 4 Ropes |
| **Moon Crystal Ore** | Very rare and hard to mine — drops **Moon Crystals** |
| **Moon Crystal** | Combine with a Trident to craft the **Moon Trident** |
| **Moon Crystal Necklace** | Crafted from 7 Ropes + 1 Moon Crystal |
| **Towel** | Crafted from 3 wool blocks (any color) — hold for **5 seconds** (XP bar acts as countdown) to revert to human form *(does not work in cold biomes)* |
| **Speed Boat** | Crafted like a normal boat, but using Iron |
| **Juice** | Bottle + Apple + Carrot → Transforms you into a mermaid after 10 seconds |
| **Coconut Smoothie** | Transforms you into a mermaid after 10 seconds |
| **Smoothie** | Bottle + Sweet Berries → Transforms you into a mermaid after 10 seconds |
| **Jelly Block** | Created by Bella's power |
| **Moon Water** | Cam gains swimming speed on contact — removed by heat power or a Towel |

---

## 🤲 Gesture Controls

| Gesture | Power | Characters |
|---|---|---|
| ✋ Open Hand | Freezing / Jelly | Emma (& Mako) / Bella |
| ✊ Fist | Melting / Boiling | Rikki & Mako |
| ☝️ One Finger | Levitation | Mako characters |

> 📖 **Gesture tutorial and required files:** https://makomoddev.github.io/mako-mermaids-mod-official/downloads

---

## 📝 Notes

- 🐛 **Please report bugs on the [Discord server](https://discord.gg/uv4sttKEw3)!**
- Many more features and improvements are planned for future updates.
- Built with **MCreator** and **Google Gemini**.
- Some sound effects are from **Pixabay** *(custom sounds planned for a future update)*.
- **Mod by MakoModDev** · Textures by **Reyeas** · Additional textures by **Google Gemini AI**.
- This page may not always be up to date — check the **Changelog** for the latest changes.
- Questions? Find me on **Discord**!
- Want to help develop the mod? **Send me a DM on Discord!**
